text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day, Matikanefukukitaru shows up with quite
a difficult request.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Ummm... I don't suppose you would approve of
me giving up on studying for this test, would you?

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: I knew it. Fine. I just wanted to put it out there.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Sigh... No way around this, huh? I suppose this calls for me to unleash my true power. Or even better yet, my spiritual power!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Grr... Ryaaah!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
What do you make of that, Trainer?! My power is
so great, the cherry blossoms are all in full
bloom...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Wait, what?! Cherry blossoms?! Where did Trainer
go?!
I'm glad you've made it, Fukukitaru.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Is that... me?! What?! I didn't know I had a
doppelganger!

text_block_list.name: Shiraoki (?)
text_block_list.text:
It is I, Shiraoki. I have taken hold of your body as
a way of manifesting myself.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Shiraoki?! Uhh, what is going on right now?

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Wait! Where are you going?! P-please, wait a
moment!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Huff... Huff... H-how did I end up racing against Shiraoki?!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Uuugh... Of course the great Shiraoki would be
this fast! But there's something different about
me...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: My body feels so light!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Phew... To think I get to run with Shiraoki. It's a
dream come true!

text_block_list.name: Shiraoki (?)
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. Hold onto this feeling. Even after you
awake, hold onto it...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: ...Trainer... I think I'm finally awake.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: That's not what I mean! I've been awakened to a new power!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm not entirely sure what she means, but her
running is certainly improving!
